name: productkit
description: A growing collection of Claude plugins for product teams — PMs, designers, engineers, researchers. Strategic thinking partners, not template fillers. Install one or all — each plugin works independently.

plugins.name: strategic-pm
plugins.description: Strategic PM co-pilot — PRDs, roadmaps, competitive analysis, user research synthesis, OKRs, GTM planning, stakeholder navigation, and a full AI Product Management Playbook.

plugins.name: product-writing-studio
plugins.description: Expert product communicator — exec updates, strategy memos, board decks, stakeholder emails, product announcements, one-pagers, design briefs, and launch comms. Audience-first, pyramid-principle driven, anti-jargon.

plugins.name: pm-interview-prep
plugins.description: PM interview coach — product sense, execution, estimation, and behavioral question coaching with JTBD-framed answers, structured decomposition, STAR format, mock interview mode, and anti-pattern detection.
